questions.question: Which country won the FIFA World Cup 2022?
questions.explanation: Argentina won the FIFA World Cup 2022 held in Qatar, defeating France in the final on 18 December 2022. Lionel Messi won the Golden Ball award.

questions.question: The 2024 Paris Olympics will be the ___ edition of the Summer Olympics:
questions.explanation: The 2024 Paris Olympics (26 July – 11 August 2024) is the 33rd Summer Olympic Games. Paris has hosted the Olympics three times: 1900, 1924, and 2024.

questions.question: India achieved its first T20 World Cup title in 2024 under which captain?
questions.explanation: India won the ICC T20 World Cup 2024, defeating South Africa in the final. The team was captained by Rohit Sharma. Virat Kohli won the Player of the Tournament award.
